mapper.select:
select
coalesce(cast(m.category_id as char), 'UNCLASSIFIED') as dimension_code, coalesce(c.category_name, '未分类') as dimension_name,
coalesce(m.material_type, 'UNKNOWN') as dimension_code, case m.material_type when 'RAW' then '原材料' when 'SEMI_FINISHED' then '半成品' when 'FINISHED' then '成品' when 'AUXILIARY' then '辅料' when 'PACKAGE' then '包装物' else coalesce(m.material_type, '未知类型') end as dimension_name,
coalesce(m.status, 'UNKNOWN') as dimension_code, case m.status when '0' then '启用' when '1' then '停用' else coalesce(m.status, '未知状态') end as dimension_name,
count(1) as material_count from material m left join material_category c on c.category_id=m.category_id
and m.material_type=#{materialType} and m.status=#{status}
and (m.category_id=#{categoryId} or m.category_id in ( select category_id from material_category where find_in_set(#{categoryId}, ancestors) ))
group by dimension_code, dimension_name order by material_count desc, dimension_code
